headline: Wells Fargo Cuts Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Target, Flags Housing Weakness
summary: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 8, Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O’Dea lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) to $75 from $82. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm noted that housing […]
